reviews.review_description:
Really fun even though multiplayer seems to be gone.
I keep finding myself going to this over my $40 games

A very addictive game with a great old-school RPG (TBS) feeling — I’m totally hooked! It’s pretty tough, but that’s actually a good thing these days. The only thing I don’t like is the auto-battle feature: it sometimes loses fights I could easily win manually. Other than that, it’s a unique and well-crafted experience. If you love RPGs, this one is definitely worth your time. I love it!
Awesome 90s game like Heroes of might and magic ! Thanks dev
